title: VC Portfolio Page
description: Venture capital or investment firm portfolio page listing companies and investment details.

firm_name.description: Name of the investment firm. Commonly found in: firm website header, about page.

firm_domain.description: Primary domain of the investment firm. Commonly found in: firm website URL.

firm_type.description: Type of investment firm. Commonly found in: about page, firm description.

investment_stages.description: Stages of investment the firm participates in. Commonly found in: about page, investment thesis.

geographic_focus.description: Geographic regions the firm focuses on. Commonly found in: about page, investment criteria.

sector_focus.description: Industry sectors the firm focuses on. Commonly found in: about page, investment thesis.

fund_size_usd.description: Size of the current or most recent fund in USD. Commonly found in: about page, press releases.

founding_year.description: Year the firm was founded. Commonly found in: about page, firm history.

managing_partners.description: List of managing partners at the firm. Commonly found in: team page, about page.

portfolio_companies.description: Companies in the firm's portfolio. Commonly found in: portfolio page, investments page.

page_title.description: Title of the source page. Tabstack auto-fills this from page metadata when left empty.

favicon.description: Favicon URL of the source page. Tabstack auto-fills this from page metadata when left empty.

PortfolioCompany.description: A company held in the firm's portfolio.

domain.description: Website domain of the portfolio company.

investment_stage.description: Stage at which the firm invested.

sector.description: Industry sector of the portfolio company.

status.description: Current status of the portfolio company.
